issue.title: @gitclaw /heartbeat risk e2e 20260530T214241Z
issue.body:
@gitclaw /heartbeat risk

Live heartbeat-risk E2E.
This should produce a deterministic heartbeat risk report without a model call.
The report must not print .gitclaw/HEARTBEAT.md contents.
Do not include this hidden issue token: GITCLAW_HEARTBEAT_RISK_HIDDEN_20260530T214241Z
issue.author: AnandChowdhary

It reports only metadata, counts, risk codes, severities, and hashes; workflow bodies, heartbeat context bodies, issue bodies, comments, raw inputs, credentials, and secret values are not included.
